title: Method and apparatus for enhancing reliability in wireless communication systems
abstract: Provided is a method and apparatus for enhancing the reliability in a wireless communication system. An operating method of a user plane function (UPF) in a wireless communication system includes: receiving network function (NF) set related information changed through an association procedure with respect to an NF; changing a profile of the NF, based on the received NF set related information; and performing an operation related to the NF, based on the changed profile.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) A method of a user plane function (UPF) in a wireless communication system, the  method comprising: receiving network function (NF) set related information changed through an association procedure with respect to an NF; changing a profile of the NF based on the received NF set related information; and performing an operation related to the NF based on the changed profile. The  method of claim 1, wherein  receiving  the NF set related information changed through the association procedure with respect to the NF comprises: receiving, from the NF, an association setup request including the NF set related information; and transmitting, to the NF, an association setup response with respect to the association setup request. The  method of claim 1, wherein  receiving  the NF set related information changed through the association procedure with respect to the NF comprises: transmitting an association setup request to the NF; and receiving, from the NF, an association setup response with respect to the association setup request including the NF set related information. The  method of claim 1, wherein  receiving  the NF set related information changed through the association procedure with respect to the NF comprises: performing an association procedure with respect to the NF; receiving, from the NF, an association update request including the NF set related information that is changed; and transmitting, to the NF, an association update response with respect to the association update request. The  method of claim 1, wherein the NF set related information comprises an NF set identification (ID). The  method of claim 1, wherein  performing  the operation related to the NF, based on the changed profile, comprises at least one of a session processing operation, a notification operation, or a fault recovery operation. The  method of claim 1, wherein: the NF set related information comprises a timer value for operating the NF using an NF set that is changed, and performing  the operation related to the NF, based on the changed profile, comprises: starting a timer, based on the timer value; and after the timer has expired, performing the operation related to the NF. The  method of claim 1, wherein the NF comprises at least one of an access and mobility management function (AMF) or a session management function (SMF). A user plane function (UPF) of a wireless communication system, the UPF comprising: a transceiver; memory; and a processor operably connected to the transceiver and the memory, the processor configured to: receive network function (NF) set related information changed through an association procedure with respect to an NF, change a profile of the NF  based on the received NF set related information, and perform  an operation related to the NF based on the changed profile. The UPF of claim 9, wherein the transceiver is further configured to: receive, from the NF, an association setup request including the NF set related information; and transmit, to the NF,  an association setup response with respect to the association setup request. The UPF of claim 9, wherein the transceiver is further configured to: transmit  an association setup request  to the NF, and receive, from the NF,  an association setup response with respect to the association setup request including the NF set related information. The UPF of claim 9, wherein: the processor is further configured to  perform an association procedure with respect to the NF;  and the transceiver is further configured to: receive, from the NF, an association update request including the NF set related information that is changed, and transmit, to the NF,  an association update response with respect to the association update request. The UPF of claim 9, wherein the NF set related information comprises an NF set identification (ID). The UPF of claim 9, wherein the processor is further configured to perform at least one of a session processing operation, a notification operation, or a fault recovery operation. The UPF of claim 9, wherein: the NF set related information comprises a timer value for operating the NF using an NF set that is changed; and the processor is further configured to: start  a timer  based on the timer value, and after the timer has expired, perform  the operation related to the NF.
